brand_identity.name: Locofast
brand_identity.core_philosophy: Fabric is the hero. The UI is the gallery.

usage.subheadings: Manrope, font-sans, tracking-wide, uppercase, text-neutral-500, text-xs

grid_system.catalog: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-x-6 gap-y-12

buttons.primary: bg-neutral-900 text-white rounded-sm px-8 py-3 text-sm tracking-widest uppercase hover:bg-neutral-800 transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-neutral-200 text-neutral-900 rounded-sm px-8 py-3 text-sm tracking-widest uppercase hover:border-neutral-900 transition-all duration-300

cards.product: group relative flex flex-col gap-4 bg-transparent

inputs.default: rounded-sm border-neutral-200 focus:border-neutral-900 focus:ring-0 bg-transparent placeholder:text-neutral-400 font-sans

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure #52525B text is not used on #E4E4E7 backgrounds for long text.

images.usage: Homepage Hero Section - Overlay with dark gradient
About Us / How It Works - Process Step

icons.usage: Use thin, refined icons to match the elegant typography

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use generic gradients. Use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
Ensure the 'Catalog' page uses a 'Masonry' or 'Clean Grid' layout with infinite scroll or pagination.
The 'Fabric Detail' page must split the screen: 50% Image (Left), 50% Details (Right).
Admin Dashboard should be dense but legible. Use 'Inter' or 'Manrope' for tables.
All prices and sensitive data must be mocked if not provided.
Implement a 'Request Sample' flow that feels like adding to a cart but for B2B inquiry.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
